Hugo (2011)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $73,864,507Details
International Box Office $106,183,277
Worldwide Box Office $180,047,784
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $18,618,339
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $16,098,658
Total $34,716,997
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A resourceful orphan boy quests to unlock a secret left to him by his father. This adventure will transform Hugo and all those around him, and reveal a safe and loving place he can call home.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$11,364,505 (15.4% of total gross)
Legs:6.50 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:41.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$180,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,277 opening theaters/2,608 max. theaters, 6.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $111,268,341

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 23rd, 2011 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: December 2nd, 2011 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
February 3rd, 2012 (Wide) (Italy)
February 9th, 2012 (Wide) (Argentina)
February 17th, 2012 (Wide) (Brazil)
February 17th, 2012 (Wide) (Netherlands)
Video Release: February 28th, 2012 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for mild thematic material, some action/peril and smoking
Running Time: 126 minutes
Award nomination: 2012 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Cast, crew, or production detail: Breaking the Fourth Wall, Ensemble, Unnamed Character, Visual Effects, Voiceover/Narration

Synopsis

A resourceful orphan boy quests to unlock a secret left to him by his father. This adventure will transform Hugo and all those around him, and reveal a safe and loving place he can call home.
